payload.answer: Brain DB is the authoritative source of truth, with Cognee as a dynamic semantic layer and Slack as the validated intake pipeline. Telegram may be added later, and cost-performance optimization is pending evaluation.

entity_resolution.reason: Telegram integration lacks prior definition; requires explicit entity creation in Brain DB schema.

relationships.object: the source of truth for durable memory
relationships.subject: Brain DB

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB is the authoritative source of truth for all durable memory storage.

relationships.object: rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB
relationships.subject: Cognee

memory_cards.statement: Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, designed for query flexibility and contextual retrieval.
Slack is a strict memory intake agent, responsible for ingesting and validating user interactions before durable storage in Brain DB.
Telegram integration is under consideration for future expansion as a secondary intake channel.
All superseded or deleted facts must be explicitly marked as such in Brain DB and excluded from Cognee projections.

relationships.object: model selection balancing price and performance
relationships.subject: cost-performance

memory_cards.statement: Cost-performance optimization is required: identify the cheapest model that saturates system performance without compromising durability.

details: Committed durable memory for Brain DB as source of truth.
Defined Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection with dependency on Brain DB.
Established Slack as strict intake agent with validation workflow.
Flagged Telegram as potential future intake channel (open question).
Enforced exclusion of superseded/deleted facts from projections.
